cowardice_flags.avoided: Dodges that BRICS flirtation is domestic political theater for Malay-Muslim base.
cowardice_flags.should_say: This is a deliberate tilt toward Beijing for geopolitical optics that exposes Malaysia to leverage without offsetting economic benefits.

cowardice_flags.avoided: Evades how 1998 controls protect patronage networks tied to bumiputera policies and cronyism.
cowardice_flags.should_say: Controls persist because full liberalization would dismantle rent-seeking structures sustaining cross-party corruption.

audience_check: Wall of RM billions and percentages feels like elite economist lecture disconnected from daily ringgit weakness, inflation, and job insecurity.

hard_truths_missing.truth: Every party weaponizes de-dollarization rhetoric for nationalist votes and China deals while preserving ethnic patronage.
Bumiputera affirmative action has entrenched state dependency that makes ringgit internationalization politically toxic.
Business elites dominate China-linked trade flows and benefit disproportionately from yuan settlements.

class_truths_avoided.truth: Working/middle-class Malaysians bear ringgit volatility and import inflation while connected elites navigate hedging with ease.

predictions.if_nothing_changes: 6 months: marginal growth with more press releases; 2 years: yuan share ~30% of China trade but total de-dollarization <5%.
predictions.who_can_fix: BNM technocrats and Anwar's economic advisors
predictions.why_they_wont: Coalition balance with Malay nationalists and crony/bumiputera lobby protection.

strongest_card.why: 1998 capital controls paradox is the core structural hypocrisy.

weakest_card.why: Mature view soft-pedals into safe balance that dilutes damning evidence.

overall_assessment: Competent and data-rich but ultimately cowardly. Stays technocratic, lectures with facts instead of confronting political rot, ethnic patronage, and elite capture that make genuine reform impossible.
